_note: Frozen calibration-sim baseline. Re-baselined 2026-06-10 for the CALIBRATION-vs-DEMONSTRATED guard (Daniel coach-audit, read his live account: Leg Ext 96x10/e1RM128 + learned factor 1.255 → the post-everything machine-calibration multiplier compounded the demonstrated-anchored base into 110x15 — heavier AND more reps than any set he has produced, with the EASE-BACK note still saying 90). Fix: clampCalibratedToDemonstrated (dp.js recommend@1446 + dp/loadModel.js) bounds the post-factor load at max(un-factored base, the user's OWN raw demonstrated-e1RM working load at the target reps; raw-working-W fallback for e1rm-ineligible lifts). The factor may still lift a sub-demonstrated base UP to proven capacity, never past it. Inert at cold start (no factor / no demonstrated capacity → byte-identical). The path-B prescription-stream hash legitimately shifts (80d35da1… → f568d8d6…). VERIFIED a NET WIN + DETERMINISTIC (two fresh runs reproduce f568d8d6, no RNG/clock leak): convergedPct 5.1→7.4 (+2.3, learns BETTER), medianSessionsToConverge 27→26, OSCILLATION 26→6 (−20: the factor was a major saw-tooth source — over-inflate, user can't hit it, correct down, re-learn, repeat; bounding it stabilized the engine), stuckHigh 5→2 (−3, fewer over-prescriptions = Daniel's bug class), crater===0 HELD, absurd===7 HELD (overshoot>3x===0 HELD). The TRADEOFF (conservatism): nonAdaptation 2→4 (+2 — P000 erratic ego-loader entering 16x5 + P009 over-entering a pre-fatigued biceps; the engine now correctly RESISTS over-entry instead of chasing it, matching Daniel's anti-ego-load intent R5; per-exercise the fix tracks demonstrated capacity correctly — isolated probe Bayesian Curl 8.3-demo → 9 rec) and stuckLow 85→93 (+8, the flip side of bounding, within the +10 oracle-gap band). meanFinalAbsErr 0.258→0.265 (+0.007, within the +0.02 gate). Equip signed bias drifted within the −0.07 band (machine −0.104→−0.122, cable −0.26→−0.294, dumbbell −0.156→−0.177, barbell −0.133→−0.149). nProfiles=12 (CI tier).
